tweets.text: RT @Starlink: Starlink Direct to Cell is now available in the UK and will provide data with voice, video and messaging to customers in area…

retweet.text: Starlink Direct to Cell is now available in the UK and will provide data with voice, video and messaging to customers in areas with no terrestrial service

quoted.text:
NEWS: We’ve become the first UK network to switch on direct-to-device satellite connectivity 🛰️ 

Enabling our customers to stay connected in areas with no traditional mobile coverage, O2 Satellite automatically connects in areas with no cellular coverage. 

From today, O2 Satellite supports text messaging and data across apps including WhatsApp, Messenger and Google Maps – providing an additional layer of reassurance when customers move to areas beyond traditional mobile coverage. 

Customers can opt-in to O2 Satellite as a £3-per-month bolt-on – and will be included at no extra cost for Ultimate Plan customers in the coming weeks 📲 

Press release 👉 https://t.co/qNfcmeVofF
